title: tribulus lanuginosus var. orientalis
intro: Tribulus lanuginosus var. orientalis, also known as Tribulus orientalis, is a species of flowering plant in the family Zygophyllaceae, native to Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and diuretic effects. The health benefits of Tribulus orientalis include improving cardiovascular health, enhancing athletic performance, and supporting kidney function, as well as having potential anti-aging and anti-cancer properties. Herbal preparations of Tribulus orientalis include capsules, tablets, and teas, which are often used to support overall health and well-being.
